details.reasoning: Implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package created at packages/pixelart/ with proper package.json; (2) createPixelArt factory function exported and functional; (3) PixelArtProvider interface defined with image/imageModel methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implements ImageModelV3 with doGenerate() method (correct for v3 spec); (5) Complete image settings support including size, style options ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity with validation; (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'; (7) Package structure properly mirrors existing AI SDK providers with tsconfig, tsup, turbo, vitest configs, and version.ts; (8) Diff contains only new files with zero modifications to existing providers. Comprehensive test coverage validates all functionality including parameter handling, error handling, headers, response parsing, and unsupported feature warnings.
